title: Opening for Software Engineer at DeHaat International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at DeHaat International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DeHaat International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About DeHaat International Enterprises:
DeHaat International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat International Enterprises!
